SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.manager

Class AnimationController

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.view.manager.AnimationController
public class AnimationController extends Object
Responsible for managing all animations and visual effects in the game.

This class handles timeline-based animations, notifications, countdown sequences, attack animations, combo bonuses, and other visual effects.

Responsibilities:

  • Manage game loop timelines (automatic brick dropping)
  • Display level-up notifications
  • Show countdown sequences
  • Render attack animations (screen shake, flash, shockwave)
  • Display combo bonus notifications
  • Manage timer animations (elapsed time, level timer)

Design Pattern: Extracted from GuiController to adhere to Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)

Version:
Phase 3 - SRP Refactoring
Author:
Dong, Jia

    • AnimationController

      public AnimationController(javafx.scene.Group notificationGroup, javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane rootPane)
      Constructs an AnimationController.
      Parameters:
      notificationGroup - the group for displaying notifications
      rootPane - the root pane for overlay animations

  • Method Details

    • startGameLoop

      public void startGameLoop(javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> moveDownHandler, int durationMs)
      Creates and starts the main game loop timeline.
      Parameters:
      moveDownHandler - the event handler for automatic downward movement
      durationMs - the duration between drops in milliseconds

    • stopGameLoop

      public void stopGameLoop()
      Stops the main game loop timeline.

    • pauseGameLoop

      public void pauseGameLoop()
      Pauses the main game loop.

    • resumeGameLoop

      public void resumeGameLoop()
      Resumes the main game loop.

    • updateGameLoopSpeed

      public void updateGameLoopSpeed(int newDurationMs, javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> moveDownHandler)
      Updates the game loop speed.
      Parameters:
      newDurationMs - the new duration between drops in milliseconds
      moveDownHandler - the event handler for automatic downward movement

    • startTimer

      public void startTimer(javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> updateHandler)
      Starts the elapsed time timer.
      Parameters:
      updateHandler - the event handler called every second

    • stopTimer

      public void stopTimer()
      Stops the elapsed time timer.

    • startLevelTimer

      public void startLevelTimer(javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> updateHandler)
      Starts the level mode timer.
      Parameters:
      updateHandler - the event handler called every second

    • stopLevelTimer

      public void stopLevelTimer()
      Stops the level mode timer.

    • stopAllTimelines

      public void stopAllTimelines()
      Stops all timelines (game loop, timers, countdown).

    • showLevelUpNotification

      public void showLevelUpNotification(int newLevel)
      Shows a level-up notification.
      Parameters:
      newLevel - the new level number

    • showCountdown

      public void showCountdown(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gamePanel1, javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gamePanel2, javafx.scene.layout.Pane boardBackground1, javafx.scene.layout.Pane boardBackground2, Runnable onComplete)
      Shows a countdown (3-2-1) before starting the game. Designed for two-player mode with separate countdown displays.
      Parameters:
      gamePanel1 - player 1's game panel
      gamePanel2 - player 2's game panel
      boardBackground1 - player 1's board background
      boardBackground2 - player 2's board background
      onComplete - callback to execute when countdown completes

    • stopCountdown

      public void stopCountdown()
      Stops the countdown animation.

    • showAttackAnimation

      public void showAttackAnimation(int player, int attackPower, javafx.scene.layout.Pane boardBackground, javafx.scene.layout.Pane gamePanel)
      Shows an enhanced attack animation on the specified player's board. Includes shockwave, screen shake, and flash effects.
      Parameters:
      player - the player number (1 or 2)
      attackPower - the number of lines being attacked
      boardBackground - player's board background pane
      gamePanel - player's game panel

    • showComboBonus

      public void showComboBonus(int player, int combo, int linesEliminated)
      Shows a combo bonus notification.
      Parameters:
      player - the player number (1 or 2)
      combo - the combo count
      linesEliminated - the number of lines eliminated

    • animateRowClear

      public void animateRowClear(javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle[][] displayMatrix, List<Integer> clearedRows, Runnable onComplete)
      Animates row clearing with a more visible effect combining flash, scale, and fade. Uses a single ParallelTransition for all cleared rows to ensure good performance.
      Parameters:
      displayMatrix - The grid of Rectangles representing the board
      clearedRows - List of row indices to clear (before clearing, so these are the actual row indices)
      onComplete - Callback to run when animation finishes
